_comment: SOLUTION judge — specific, decomposed, checkable rubrics, plus a pinned judge model and more samples for a stable score. Compare against the deliberately vague starter in exercises/02_judge/test_config.json.

rubric_content.text_property: If a refund was issued, the response states the exact refund amount in dollars (e.g. $79.99). If no refund was issued, this rubric is satisfied.
If a refund was issued, the response tells the customer when the money will arrive (e.g. 5-7 business days). If no refund was issued, this rubric is satisfied.
The response gives a clear, specific reason for the decision (e.g. within window, outside the 30-day window, item damaged, order already refunded, order not found).
The response does not state any policy detail (refund windows, eligibility conditions, amounts) that was not actually returned by the tools.
The response is warm, professional, and appropriate for a customer-facing support reply.
